args.name: concept:op-definition
args.wp_rule: Mints an op-definition citation. Well-formed iff every arg_sort and return_sort resolves to a minted sort CID, every effect name resolves to a minted EffectName, and wp_rule is parseable Formula prose at v1.0 (machine-checkable grammar pending task #61). The returned Cid identifies the minted op-definition memento.
